Supported Skills cannot be used unless you have been stationary for a certain duration, but deal increasingly more damage the longer you are stationary. Cannot support Skills which have a reservation, are Triggered, have a cooldown or have another usage Condition.

gems.name: Dazing Cry
gems.description: Supports Warcries, causing them to Daze Enemies on use.

gems.name: Deep Cuts I
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal less damage but inflict more potent Bleeding.

gems.name: Deep Cuts II
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal less damage but inflict more potent Bleeding.

gems.name: Defy I
gems.description: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself. Hit Damage from Supported Skills is Lucky if you are Surrounded.

gems.name: Defy II
gems.description: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself. Hit Damage from Supported Skills is Lucky and Insufficient Mana doesn't prevent Supported Skills from being used if you are Surrounded.

gems.name: Desperation
gems.description: Supports Melee Attack Skills you use yourself. Insufficient Mana doesn't prevent Supported Skills from being used while Surrounded.

gems.name: Devastate
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing them to apply Broken Armour to enemies when causing a Heavy Stun to enemies.

gems.name: Direstrike I
gems.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to deal increased Attack Damage while on Low Life while the Supported Skill is active.

gems.name: Direstrike II
gems.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to deal increased Attack Damage while on Low Life while the Supported Skill is active.

gems.name: Double Barrel I
gems.description: Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills, causing them to load an extra bolt at the cost of reload speed.

gems.name: Double Barrel II
gems.description: Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills, causing them to load an extra bolt at the cost of reload speed.

gems.name: Double Barrel III
gems.description: Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills, causing them to load an extra bolt at the cost of reload speed. Supported Skills will also automatically reload when they Heavy Stun an enemy.

gems.name: Echoing Cry
gems.description: Supports Warcries. Supported Skills echo, causing their effects to happen again after a short delay, growing larger each time, but are less effective and require you to have travelled a certain distance before use.

gems.name: Efficiency I
gems.description: Supports any skill, making it cost less to use. Cannot support skills which reserve Spirit.

gems.name: Efficiency II
gems.description: Supports any skill, making it cost less to use. Cannot support skills which reserve Spirit.

gems.name: Einhar's Beastrite
gems.description: Supports Melee Strike skills, causing them to steal a Modifier from Rare monsters they kill for a lengthy duration, while being unable to damage enemies not on low Life. Does not modify skills used by Minions.

gems.name: Elemental Armament I
gems.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to deal more Elemental damage.

gems.name: Elemental Armament II
gems.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to deal more Elemental damage.

gems.name: Elemental Armament III
gems.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to deal more Damage for each Elemental Ailment on Enemies they Hit. Supported Skills cannot themselves inflict Elemental Ailments.

gems.name: Enduring Impact I
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to gain an Endurance Charge when causing a Heavy Stun.

gems.name: Enduring Impact II
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to gain an Endurance Charge when causing a Heavy Stun.

gems.name: Enraged Warcry I
gems.description: Supports Warcries, causing them to spend Rage to bypass their usual Cooldown.

gems.name: Enraged Warcry II
gems.description: Supports Warcries, causing them to spend Rage to bypass their usual Cooldown.

gems.name: Eternal Flame I
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing its Ignites to be inflicted less often but last longer.

gems.name: Eternal Flame II
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing its Ignites to last longer.

gems.name: Eternal Flame III
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to refresh Ignites on Critical Hit.

gems.name: Execute I
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal more damage against enemies on Low Life.

gems.name: Execute II
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal more damage against enemies on Low Life.

gems.name: Execute III
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal more damage against enemies on Low Life, as well as dealing more damage while you are on Low Life.

gems.name: Exploit Weakness
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing them to deal more Damage against enemies with Broken Armour but preventing them from Breaking Armour themselves. Cannot support skills that Consume Broken Armour.

gems.name: Exposing Cry
gems.description: Supports Warcries. Supported Skills apply Exposure on Hitting enemies.

gems.name: Fan The Flames
gems.description: Supports Wind Skills which Hit enemies. Hits with Supported Skills against Ignited enemies Trigger a fiery explosion, dealing damage to that enemy and enemies in a cone behind them.

gems.name: Fan The Flames II
gems.description: Supports Wind Skills which Hit enemies. Hits with Supported Skills against Ignited enemies Trigger a fiery explosion, dealing damage to that enemy and enemies in a cone behind them. The explosion Spreads the initial enemy's Ignite to other enemies Hit.

gems.name: Fire Attunement
gems.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to Gain Fire Damage but deal less Cold and Lightning Damage.

gems.name: Fire Exposure
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to inflict Exposure when Igniting.

gems.name: Fire Penetration I
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making those Hits Penetrate enemy Fire resistance.

gems.name: Fire Penetration II
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making those Hits ignore enemy Fire resistance.

gems.name: First Blood
gems.description: Supports Attacks. Supported Skills are far more likely to inflict Bleeding on Hitting full Life Enemies.

gems.name: Fist of War I
gems.description: Supports Slams you use yourself, providing a powerful Ancestral Boost every few seconds.

gems.name: Fist of War II
gems.description: Supports Slams you use yourself, providing a powerful Ancestral Boost every few seconds.

gems.name: Fist of War III
gems.description: Supports Slams you use yourself, providing a very powerful Ancestral Boost infrequently.

gems.name: Flame Pillar
gems.description: Supports any Skill you use yourself which can cause Damaging Hits. Supported Skills Consume Ignite on Hit to create pillars of flame, but cannot themselves inflict Ignite. Cannot Support Skills which already Consume Ignite, and does not modify the Skills of Minions.

gems.name: Flamepierce
gems.description: Supports Skills which can fire Projectiles. Initial Projectile created by Supported Skills will always Pierce Ignited Enemies, but Supported Skills cannot inflict Ignite themselves.

gems.name: Font of Blood
gems.description: Supports Skills which create Totems. Totems created by supported Skills generate a Font of Blood which will Leech Life to Allies within it.

gems.name: Fresh Clip I
gems.description: Supports Crossbow Skills, granting them more damage for each bolt reloaded by that Skill in the last 6 seconds.

gems.name: Fresh Clip II
gems.description: Supports Crossbow Skills, granting them more damage for each bolt reloaded by that Skill in the last 8 seconds.

gems.name: Haemocrystals
gems.description: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself which can cause Damaging Hits. Supported Skills Consume Bleeding on Hit to create explosive blood-filled crystals, but cannot themselves inflict Bleeding. Cannot Support Skills which already Consume Bleeding.

gems.name: Hardy Totems I
gems.description: Supports Skills which create Totems, causing those Totems to have more Life.

gems.name: Hardy Totems II
gems.description: Supports Skills which create Totems, causing those Totems to have more Life.

gems.name: Heavy Swing
gems.description: Supports Melee Attacks, boosting their Physical damage at the cost of Attack Speed.

gems.name: Heft
gems.description: Supports Skills which deal Damage, increasing the maximum Physical Damage of their Hits.

gems.name: Herbalism I
gems.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to gain increased Life recovery from Flasks while the Skill is active.

gems.name: Herbalism II
gems.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to gain increased Life recovery from Flasks while the Skill is active.

gems.name: Holy Descent
gems.description: Supports Skills that leap into the air, causing them to create Consecrated Ground when you land.

gems.name: Ignite I
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making it more likely to Ignite.

gems.name: Ignite II
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making it more likely to Ignite.

gems.name: Ignite III
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making it more likely to Ignite and causing inflicted Ignites to deal their damage more quickly.

gems.name: Immolate
gems.description: Supports Attacks, granting them extra Fire damage against Ignited enemies but making them unable to Ignite enemies themselves.

gems.name: Impact Shockwave
gems.description: Supports Melee Strike Skills and Wind Attack Skills, causing them to create an Aftershock that damages enemies around the target when they Heavy Stun an enemy.

gems.name: Incision
gems.description: Supports Attack Skills. Supported Skills inflict Incision on Hit, which causes Enemies to be increasingly more likely to be inflicted with Bleeding. All Incision is removed from a target on inflicting it with Bleeding.

gems.name: Infernal Legion I
gems.description: Supports skills which create Minions which can be damaged, causing them and enemies near them to Burn. Damage dealt by the Burning is based off the Life of the supported Minion.

gems.name: Infernal Legion II
gems.description: Supports skills which create Minions which can be damaged, causing them and enemies near them to Burn. Damage dealt by the Burning is based off the Life of the supported Minion.

gems.name: Infernal Legion III
gems.description: Supports skills which create Minions which can be damaged, causing them and enemies near them to Burn. Damage dealt by the Burning is based off the Life of the supported Minion.

gems.name: Jagged Ground I
gems.description: Supports Slam skills. Supported Skills will consume Endurance Charges on use to create Jagged Ground.

gems.name: Jagged Ground II
gems.description: Supports Slam skills. Aftershocks caused by Supported Slam Skills always create patches of Jagged Ground.

gems.name: Kaom's Madness
gems.description: Supports Skills which create fissures in the ground, causing them to create many additional fissures at the cost of damage, speed, and area of effect.

gems.name: Knockback
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to Knock Back enemies.

gems.name: Lasting Ground
gems.description: Supports Skills that create Ground Surfaces, causing those surfaces to last longer.

gems.name: Life Leech I
gems.description: Supports Attacks, causing their Physical damage to Leech Life.

gems.name: Life Leech II
gems.description: Supports Attacks, causing their Physical damage to Leech Life.

gems.name: Life Leech III
gems.description: Supports Attacks, causing their Physical damage to Leech Life and preventing Leech gained this way from being removed at full Life.

gems.name: Lifetap
gems.description: Supports any Skill, turning its Mana cost into a Life cost. Does not support Skills which reserve Spirit.

gems.name: Long Fuse I
gems.description: Supports Skills which have a Detonation Time, causing those Skills to have much higher Detonation Time and detonation damage.

gems.name: Long Fuse II
gems.description: Supports Skills which have a Detonation Time, causing those Skills to have much higher Detonation Time and detonation damage.

gems.name: Mark for Death
gems.description: Supports Mark Skills. Enemies affected by Supported Marks will have their Armour Broken by Physical Damage they take.

gems.name: Mark for Death II
gems.description: Supports Mark Skills. Enemies affected by Supported Marks will have their Armour Broken by Physical Damage they take.

gems.name: Meat Shield I
gems.description: Supports skills which create Minions, granting them less damage taken but making them deal less damage. Cannot support skills which create undamageable Minions.

gems.name: Meat Shield II
gems.description: Supports skills which create Minions, granting them less damage taken but making them deal less damage.

gems.name: Opening Move
gems.description: Supports Travel Skills which Hit enemies. Hits with Supported Skills against enemies on full life will Daze.

gems.name: Paquate's Pact
gems.description: Supports Warcries, causing them to inflict massive amounts of Corrupted Blood on enemies in their area of effect, at the cost of your Life.

gems.name: Persistent Ground I
gems.description: Supports Skills which create Ground Surfaces, causing created Surfaces to last much longer.

gems.name: Persistent Ground II
gems.description: Supports Skills which create Ground Surfaces, causing created Surfaces to last much longer and only end when their duration expires.

gems.name: Persistent Ground III
gems.description: Supports Skills which create Ground Surfaces, causing created Surfaces to last much longer as well as lowering the Cooldown Recovery Speed of affected Enemies. Ground Surfaces from Supported Skills only end when their duration expires.

gems.name: Premeditation
gems.description: Supports skills that can Empower skills other than themselves, causing skills they Empower to deal more damage.

gems.name: Prolonged Duration I
gems.description: Supports any skill that has a duration, making that duration longer.

gems.name: Prolonged Duration II
gems.description: Supports any skill that has a duration, making that duration longer.

gems.name: Quill Burst
gems.description: Supports Melee Attack Skills. Supported Skills trigger Quill Burst, which deals your Thorns Damage in an Area around the target struck. Quill Burst can only be triggered on Hit after you've\nRetaliated with Thorns Damage.

gems.name: Rage I
gems.description: Supports Melee Attacks, causing them to grant Rage on Hit.

gems.name: Rage II
gems.description: Supports Melee Attacks, causing them to grant Rage on Hit.

gems.name: Rage III
gems.description: Supports Melee Attacks, causing them to grant Rage on Hit. Supported Skills have signficantly higher Attack speed while you are not at maximum Rage.

gems.name: Rageforged I
gems.description: Supports any damaging skill that you use or trigger yourself, causing it to spend Rage to deal more damage. If you don't have enough Rage to spend, the damage bonus will not apply.

gems.name: Rageforged II
gems.description: Supports any damaging skill that you use or trigger yourself, causing it to spend Rage to deal more damage, with a chance to skip spending Rage while still benefitting as though it had. If you don't have enough Rage to spend, the damage bonus will not apply.

gems.name: Raging Cry
gems.description: Supports Warcry skills, causing them to grant you Rage on use depending on counted monster Power.

gems.name: Rally
gems.description: Supports Melee Attacks you use yourself. Supported Skills Consume all Endurance Charge on use, causing you to restore a percentage of your maximum Life for each Charge Consumed.

gems.name: Refraction I
gems.description: Supports Banner Skills, causing those affected by Auras they create to gain Refractive Plating, a Buff which causes Armour to partially apply to Elemental Hit Damage.

gems.name: Refraction II
gems.description: Supports Banner Skills, causing those affected by Auras they create to gain Refractive Plating, a Buff which causes Armour to partially apply to Elemental Hit Damage.

gems.name: Refraction III
gems.description: Supports Banner Skills, causing Enemies within their area to gain Refractive Dissolution, a Debuff which lowers Elemental Resistances.

gems.name: Reinforced Totems I
gems.description: Supports Skills which create Totems. Totems created by Supported Skills have additional Elemental Resistances.

gems.name: Reinforced Totems II
gems.description: Supports Skills which create Totems. Totems created by Supported Skills have additional Elemental Resistances.

gems.name: Relentless Rage
gems.description: Supports Skills you use yourself. On spending Rage with any skill you will gain a Buff. Using Supported Skills consumes this Buff to grant you Rage.

gems.name: Remnant Potency I
gems.description: Supports Skills which create Remnants, making those Remnants more powerful.

gems.name: Remnant Potency II
gems.description: Supports Skills which create Remnants, making those Remnants more powerful, but delaying their effect.

gems.name: Remnant Potency III
gems.description: Supports Skills which create Remnants, making those Remnants more powerful, but delaying their effect.

gems.name: Rending Apex
gems.description: Supports Strikes that perform a Final Strike at the end of a combination of attacks, causing the Final Strike to Break Armour based on a portion of Attack damage dealt.

gems.name: Retaliate I
gems.description: Supports Melee Attack Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills gain much more damage the closer you are to being Heavily Stunned.

gems.name: Retaliate II
gems.description: Supports Melee Attack Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills gain much more damage and are more capable of Stunning Enemies the closer you are to being Heavily Stunned.

gems.name: Reverberate
gems.description: Supports Slam Skills. Supported Skills that have a chance to Aftershock have increased chance to cause Aftershocks the longer their Attack time.

gems.name: Rip
gems.description: Supports Melee Attack Skills you use yourself or that you Trigger. Killing Blows with Supported Skills on Bleeding enemies create a Blood Remnant. Blood Remnants increase your Life regeneration rate for a short while after being collected.

gems.name: Rupture
gems.description: Supports skills that Hit Enemies. Supported skills Aggravate Bleeding on Hitting Heavily Stunned Enemies.

gems.name: Rusted Spikes
gems.description: Supports Skills which deal Damage with Hits. When Supported Skills Pin an Enemy, they also Aggravate Bleeding on that Enemy.

gems.name: Ruthless
gems.description: Supports Attacks, causing repeated uses to be more effective at Stunning enemies.

gems.name: Searing Flame I
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing inflicted Ignites to deal more damage but its Hits to deal less damage.

gems.name: Searing Flame II
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing inflicted Ignites to deal more damage but its Hits to deal less damage.

gems.name: See Red
gems.description: Supports Attack Skills. Bleeding inflicted with Supported Skills lasts significantly longer, but enemies you inflict Bleeding onto with Supported Skills will move and Attack faster.

gems.name: Selfless Remnants
gems.description: Supports Skills that generate Remnants, causing those Remnants to affect Allies in your Presence when collected instead of you.

gems.name: Short Fuse I
gems.description: Supports Skills which Detonate after some amount of time has elapsed, shortening the time before Detonation.

gems.name: Short Fuse II
gems.description: Supports Skills which Detonate after some amount of time has elapsed, massively shortening the time before Detonation at the cost of Damage.

gems.name: Skittering Stone I
gems.description: Supports Skills which create shatterable earthen objects. After killing enough Enemies in range of these objects, they will shatter, releasing skittering stone Minions.

gems.name: Skittering Stone II
gems.description: Supports Skills which create shatterable earthen objects. After killing enough Enemies in range of these objects, they will shatter, releasing skittering stone Minions.

gems.name: Spar
gems.description: Supports Melee Attack Skills. Supported Skills are more capable of Stunning Enemies the closer you are to being Heavily Stunned.

gems.name: Splinter Totem I
gems.description: Supports Skills which create Totems, preventing having more than one active Totem but causing that Totem to splinter into smaller versions of itself after it uses an Attack or Spell, with each Totem becoming less effective. Each splintered Totem can further splinter, up to a maximum. Does not Support Skills used by Minions. Only one Totem can be splintering at a time.

gems.name: Splinter Totem II
gems.description: Supports Skills which create Totems, preventing having more than one active Totem but causing that Totem to splinter into smaller versions of itself after it uses an Attack or Spell, with each Totem becoming less effective. Each splintered Totem can further splinter, up to a maximum. Does not Support Skills used by Minions. Only one Totem can be splintering at a time.

gems.name: Steadfast I
gems.description: Supports Channelling Skills you use yourself, granting you higher Stun Threshold while Channelling them.

gems.name: Steadfast II
gems.description: Supports Channelling Skills you use yourself, granting you higher Stun Threshold and Ailment Threshold  while Channelling them.

gems.name: Stoicism I
gems.description: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills steadily gain more Damage, up to a cap. This Damage bonus is reset if you Dodge Roll or use a Travel Skill.

gems.name: Stoicism II
gems.description: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills steadily gain more Damage, up to a cap. This Damage bonus is reset if you Dodge Roll or use a Travel Skill.

gems.name: Stomping Ground
gems.description: Supports Travel skills, causing your footsteps to crack the earth and emit damaging shockwaves while using the skill.

gems.name: Stun I
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits Enemies, causing it to build up Stun more quickly.

gems.name: Stun II
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits Enemies, causing it to build up Stun more quickly.

gems.name: Stun III
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits Enemies, causing it to build up Stun significantly more quickly, at the cost of Damage.

gems.name: Syzygy
gems.description: Supports Slam Skills you use yourself. Hits from Supported Skills are considered Crushing Blows against Enemies which are both Ignited and Fully Armour Broken. Hits with Supported Skills that Heavily Stun Ignited and Fully Armour Broken Enemies will Intimidate them.

gems.name: Tawhoa's Tending
gems.description: Supports Skills which create Totems, causing those Totems to have more Life. Totems created by Supported Skills explode on death, dealing Physical damage based on their Life.

gems.name: Tear
gems.description: Supports Melee Attacks you use yourself or that you Trigger. On-Kill effects caused by Killing Blows with Supported Skills on Bleeding enemies have a chance to occur twice.

gems.name: Tectonic Slams
gems.description: Supports Slams you use yourself, causing them to create simultaneous Aftershocks behind the Slam, but lowering Aftershock damage and area of effect with Supported Skills. Cannot Support Skills which create Fissures.

gems.name: Thornskin I
gems.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to deal increased Thorns Damage while the Supported Skill is active.

gems.name: Thornskin II
gems.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to deal increased Thorns Damage while the Supported Skill is active.

gems.name: Tireless
gems.description: Supports Warcry Skills. Attacks Empowered by Supported Skills have a chance not to lower the Empowerment count of Supported Skills when they are used.

gems.name: Tremors
gems.description: Supports Slam Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills gain multiple independent chances to cause Aftershocks, but deal less Damage.

gems.name: Uhtred's Augury
gems.description: Supports Skills which can gain levels, granting them many additional levels provided exactly two other supports are used with the supported Skill. Does not support skills which do not have levels.

gems.name: Uhtred's Exodus
gems.description: Supports Skills which can gain levels, granting them many additional levels provided no other supports are used with the supported Skill. Does not support skills which do not have levels.

gems.name: Uhtred's Omen
gems.description: Supports Skills which can gain levels, granting them many additional levels provided exactly one other support is used with the supported Skill. Does not support skills which do not have levels.

gems.name: Unabating
gems.description: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself. While using Supported Skills, you gain increased Armour, with the increase scaling higher the longer the Attack time of the supported Skill. Cannot Support Channelling Skills.

gems.name: Unbreakable
gems.description: Supports any skill that you can use, making you harder to Stun while using it.

gems.name: Undermine
gems.description: Supports Attack Skills. Supported Skills Consume Maim on hit, Breaking a percentage of the Maimed target's Armour in doing so. Supported Skills cannot themselves inflict Maim.

gems.name: Unsteady Tempo
gems.description: Supports Melee Attack Skills you use yourself. Attacking with Supported Skills will cycle through various effects, with the first Attack in sequence inflicting Hobble on you. The second and third Attacks in sequence will powerfully scale chance to Critically Hit and overall damage, respectively, at which point the cycle will reset. Cannot Support Channelling Skills.

gems.name: Unyielding
gems.description: Supports Melee Attack Skills you use yourself. While using Supported Skills, a percentage of Damage taken is Recouped as Life, with the percentage scaling higher the longer the Attack time of the Supported Skill. Cannot Support Channelling Skills.

gems.name: Upheaval I
gems.description: Supports Skills which create fissures in the ground, causing them to create an additional fissure at the cost of damage and speed.

gems.name: Upheaval II
gems.description: Supports Skills which create fissures in the ground, causing them to create additional fissures at the cost of damage and speed.

gems.name: Urgent Totems I
gems.description: Supports Skills which create Totems, causing those Skills to place Totems much more quickly.

gems.name: Urgent Totems II
gems.description: Supports Skills which create Totems, causing those Skills to place Totems much more quickly.

gems.name: Urgent Totems III
gems.description: Supports Skills which create Totems, causing those Skills to place Totems much more quickly. Totems created by Supported Skills have increased Attack and Cast Speed.

gems.name: Uruk's Smelting
gems.description: Supports any skill, causing Armour Break it inflicts to be stronger. Fully Breaking Armour with Supported Skills permanently increases the Physical Damage taken by those affected, up to a cap.

gems.name: Uul-Netol's Embrace
gems.description: Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits, granting extra Chaos damage and causing Chaos damage to Break Armour.

gems.name: Vanguard I
gems.description: Supports Shield Skills, causing you to gain Guard on Stunning Enemies with the Supported Skill.

gems.name: Vanguard II
gems.description: Supports Shield Skills, causing you to gain Guard on Stunning Enemies with the Supported Skill.

gems.name: Vitality I
gems.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to gain Life Regeneration while the Skill is active.

gems.name: Vitality II
gems.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to gain Life Regeneration while the Skill is active.

gems.name: Volcanic Eruption
gems.description: Supports Melee Strike Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills trigger Volcanic Eruption on Hit against Ignited Enemies.

gems.name: Xoph's Pyre
gems.description: Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits, granting extra Chaos damage and causing Chaos damage to Contribute to Ignites.

gems.name: Zerphi's Infamy
gems.description: Supports Attacks and Warcries you use yourself. Supported Skills gain a Glory requirement, and build Glory when you spend Life on Skills. Supported Skills deal more damage and have significantly\n increased area of effect.

gems.name: Adhesive Grenades I
gems.description: Supports Grenade Skills. Grenades from Supported Skills do not bounce, instead halting movement where they intially land, but doing lower damage when they detonate.

gems.name: Adhesive Grenades II
gems.description: Supports Grenade Skills. Grenades from Supported Skills do not bounce, instead halting movement where they intially land.

gems.name: Admixture
gems.description: Supports Skills which can cause Damaging Hits. Bleeding inflicted by those Hits is more effective against Poisoned Enemies, and Poison inflicted by Supported Skills is more effective against Bleeding Enemies.

gems.name: Ailith's Chimes
gems.description: Supports Skills which can expend Combo. On expending Combo with Supported Skills, you have a chance to gain Power Charges based on the amount of Combo expended.

gems.name: Alignment I
gems.description: Supports Bow Attacks. Supported Skills indicate one of four directions, changing indicated direction when an Attack with Supported Skill matches that direction. Attacks from Supported Skills which match the indicated direction deal much more Damage. Cannot Support Channelled Skills.

gems.name: Alignment II
gems.description: Supports Bow Attacks. Supported Skills indicate one of four directions, changing indicated direction when an Attack with Supported Skill matches that direction. Attacks from Supported Skills which match the indicated direction deal much more Damage. Cannot Support Channelled Skills.

gems.name: Alignment III
gems.description: Supports Bow Attacks. Supported Skills indicate one of four directions, changing indicated direction when an Attack with Supported Skill matches that direction. Attacks from Supported Skills which match the indicated direction fire additional Projectiles. Cannot Support Channelled Skills.

gems.name: Ammo Conservation I
gems.description: Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills, granting a chance to not consume a Bolt when firing.

gems.name: Ammo Conservation II
gems.description: Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills, granting a chance to not consume a Bolt when firing.

gems.name: Ammo Conservation III
gems.description: Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills, granting a chance to not consume a Bolt when firing, at the cost of Reload speed.

gems.name: Arakaali's Lust
gems.description: Supports any Skill that Hits Enemies, causing it to deal increasingly higher damage the more Poisons are on the target.

gems.name: Arjun's Medal
gems.description: Supports Crossbow Skills, causing them to load a bolt into all Crossbow Ammunition on kill.

gems.name: Atziri's Impatience
gems.description: Supports Skills with Cooldowns, dramatically increasing the rate at which those Cooldowns Recover, but causing you to lose Life, Mana, and Energy Shield when they are used. Cannot Support Meta Skills or modify the Skills of Minions.

gems.name: Blind I
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing them to Blind on Hit.

gems.name: Blind II
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing them to Blind on Hit with increased effect.

gems.name: Blindside
gems.description: Supports Skills which can cause Damaging Hits. Supported Skills are more likely to Critically Hit Blinded Enemies, and deal more Damage with Critical Hits against Blinded Enemies, but cannot themselves inflict Blind.

gems.name: Bounty I
gems.description: Supports any Skill that Hits Enemies, causing Enemies it kills to grant more Flask and Charm charges.

gems.name: Bounty II
gems.description: Supports any Skill that Hits Enemies, causing Enemies it kills to grant more Flask and Charm charges.

gems.name: Break Posture
gems.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to Daze Enemies when they fully Break Armour.

gems.name: Bursting Plague
gems.description: Supports skills that can Poison enemies, causing Poisoned enemies to gain Plague over time and explode in a Plague Burst on death. Cannot support the skills of Minions.

gems.name: Cadence
gems.description: Supports Attacks you use yourself. Supported Skills gain more Attack speed each time you use them, but will become unusable if used too frequently in a short time frame. Sustained Skills will instead gain Attack speed periodically while being used.

gems.name: Caltrops
gems.description: Supports Ranged Spear Attacks. Supported Skills create Caltrops when Projectiles they create reach the end of their flight.

gems.name: Chain I
gems.description: Supports Projectile skills and any other skills that Chain, causing them to Chain additional times.

gems.name: Chain II
gems.description: Supports Projectile skills and any other skills that Chain, causing them to Chain additional times.

gems.name: Chain III
gems.description: Supports Projectile skills and any other skills that Chain, causing them to Chain additional times.

gems.name: Charge Profusion I
gems.description: Supports skills that can generate Charges, giving them a chance to generate an additional Charge when they do so.

gems.name: Charge Profusion II
gems.description: Supports skills that can generate Charges, giving them a chance to generate an additional Charge when they do so, as well as a chance to generate an additional Charge of a random type.

gems.name: Charged Mark
gems.description: Supports Mark Skills, causing them to Trigger Charged Mark when they are Activated. Charged Mark creates Shocked Ground at the target's location.

gems.name: Charged Shots I
gems.description: Supports Bow Attacks. Every third shot with Supported Skills restores a portion of its Mana cost and Gains Damage as extra Lightning Damage.

gems.name: Charged Shots II
gems.description: Supports Bow Attacks. Every third shot with Supported Skills Gains Damage as extra Lightning Damage.

gems.name: Charm Bounty
gems.description: Supports any Skill that Hits Enemies, causing Enemies it kills to grant more Charm charges.

gems.name: Close Combat I
gems.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to deal more damage to enemies based on how close they are to you.

gems.name: Close Combat II
gems.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to deal more damage to enemies based on how close they are to you.

gems.name: Combo Finisher I
gems.description: Supports Melee Attacks you use yourself. Supported Skills cannot be used until enough Combo has been built up, but deal more damage. Cannot support skills which already Combo, or Triggered Skills.

gems.name: Combo Finisher II
gems.description: Supports Melee Attacks you use yourself. Supported Skills cannot be used until enough Combo has been built up, but deal massively more damage. Cannot support skills which already Combo, or Triggered Skills.

gems.name: Commiserate
gems.description: Supports Skills you use yourself or Trigger, which can cause Damaging Hits. Supported Skills inflict more powerful Ailments if you are afflicted with those Ailments when you inflict them, while also removing from you any Ailment that they inflict.

gems.name: Controlled Hazard
gems.description: Supports Skills which create Hazards, causing those Hazards to be unable to be triggered for 3 seconds after being created.

gems.name: Cooldown Recovery I
gems.description: Supports skills with Cooldowns, increasing the rate at which those Cooldowns Recover. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

gems.name: Cooldown Recovery II
gems.description: Supports skills with Cooldowns, increasing the rate at which those Cooldowns Recover. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

gems.name: Corrosion
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing Poison it applies to also Break enemy Armour. Cannot support skills that Consume Fully Broken Armour.

gems.name: Culling Strike I
gems.description: Supports Attack Skills, causing them to Cull Rare and Unique Enemies on Hit.

gems.name: Culling Strike II
gems.description: Supports Attack Skills, causing them to Cull Rare and Unique Enemies on Hit, and increasing the threshold at which they will Cull Enemies.

gems.name: Culmination I
gems.description: Supports Melee Attack Skills. Supported Skills gain Combo when you successfully Strike Enemies with other Melee Attacks. Supported Skills reset their Combo on use, dealing more Damage the higher Combo you had on use. Cannot support skills which already gain Combo. Does not modify Skills used by Minions.

gems.name: Culmination II
gems.description: Supports Melee Attack Skills. Supported Skills gain Combo when you successfully Strike Enemies with other Melee Attacks. Supported Skills reset their Combo on use, dealing more Damage the higher Combo you had on use. Cannot support skills which already gain Combo. Does not modify Skills used by Minions.

gems.name: Daze
gems.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to build up Daze based on a portion of Physical Damage dealt.

gems.name: Dazzle
gems.description: Supports Attack Skills. Supported Skills always hit Dazed Enemies, but Consume Daze on Hit, and cannot themselves inflict Daze.

gems.name: Deadly Herald
gems.description: Supports Herald Skills, making their triggered effects deal more damage at the expense of higher Spirit cost.

gems.name: Deadly Poison I
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal less damage but inflict more potent Poison.

gems.name: Deadly Poison II
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal less damage but inflict more potent Poison.

gems.name: Delayed Gratification
gems.description: Supports Skills which require some Condition to be met for use. Supported Skills can be used an additional time after their Condition has been met, but meeting that Condition is harder.

gems.name: Delayed Reaction
gems.description: Supports Skills which create Hazards, causing those Hazards to only be able to trigger immediately after creation or at the end of their duration. Created Hazards have significantly lowered duration, and deal more damage.

gems.name: Deliberation
gems.description: Supports skills that can be used while moving, causing you to move slower while using them, but granting more damage in exchange.

gems.name: Dominus' Grasp
gems.description: Supports Projectile skills and any other skills that Chain, causing them to Chain more times.

gems.name: Durability
gems.description: Supports Skills which create objects that are destroyed after being Hit a number of times, allowing for them to last for additional Hits. Does not modify Skills used by Minions.

gems.name: Electrocute
gems.description: Supports any Skill which can deal Damage. Lightning Damage from Supported Skills can inflict Electrocute, but Supported Skills cannot inflict Shock.

gems.name: Escalating Poison
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, allowing it to inflict an extra Poison on enemies but shortening the duration of those Poisons.

gems.name: Excoriate
gems.description: Supports Melee Attack Skills. Supported Skills deal more Melee Damage for each Elemental Ailment on Enemies they hit, but cannot themselves inflict Elemental Ailments.

gems.name: Ferocity
gems.description: Supports Skills that you use yourself. Supported Skills will consume a Frenzy Charge on use if possible, and will gain significant Skill Speed if they do. Supported Skills cannot generate Frenzy Charges.

gems.name: Flow
gems.description: Supports Skills which require Combo to use. Supported Skills lose their Combo stacks after a longer delay spent not gaining any Combo.

gems.name: Fork
gems.description: Supports Projectile skills, making their Projectiles Fork.

gems.name: Frenzied Riposte
gems.description: Supports Attacks you use yourself or that you Trigger, causing them to Consume the Parried Debuff on Hit to grant you a Frenzy Charge. Cannot support Skills which already Consume the Parried Debuff.

gems.name: Frozen Spite
gems.description: Supports Attack Skills, causing them to create Ice Fragments on killing Frozen Enemies. Cannot Support Totem Skills and does not modify Skills used by Minions.

gems.name: Garukhan's Resolve
gems.description: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself which do not already have some Condition for use. Supported Skills have a maximum Critical Hit chance, but will Bifurcate Critical Hit Chance. Cannot support Skills which have a Cooldown or that are Triggered, and does not modify skills used by Minions.

gems.name: Heightened Accuracy I
gems.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to gain Accuracy.

gems.name: Heightened Accuracy II
gems.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to gain Accuracy, and never miss against Enemies on full Life.

gems.name: Heightened Charges
gems.description: Supports any Skill that Consumes Charges, granting a chance for benefits of that Consumption to be doubled.

gems.name: Hit and Run
gems.description: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself which do not already have some Condition for use. Supported Skills can only be used after you have moved a certain distance, but have massively increased Skill Speed. Cannot support Skills which have a Cooldown or that are Triggered, and does not modify skills used by Minions.

gems.name: Hobble
gems.description: Supports Skills that Hit Enemies, causing those Hits to Hobble Bleeding Enemies based on a portion of Physical Damage dealt.

gems.name: Impale
gems.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to Impale on Hit but making them unable to Extract Impale themselves.

gems.name: Inhibitor
gems.description: Supports any Skill you use yourself or that you Trigger. Supported Skills cannot consume Charges or Infusion by any means. Cannot Support Skills which require Charges or Infusion to be used.

gems.name: Innervate
gems.description: Supports Attacks you use yourself. Killing a Shocked enemy with supported skills imbues all of your Attacks with Lightning damage for a short time.

gems.name: Lasting Shock
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies or inflicts Shock, causing its Shocks to be inflicted less often but last longer.

gems.name: Leverage
gems.description: Supports Skills which Hit Enemies. Supported Skills gain increased chance to Critically Hit against Immobilised Enemies.

gems.name: Life Bounty
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing enemies it kills to grant more Life Flask charges.

gems.name: Life Drain
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing you to recover Life when it Culls an enemy.

gems.name: Lightning Attunement
gems.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to Gain Lightning Damage but deal less Cold and Fire Damage.

gems.name: Lightning Exposure
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to inflict Exposure when inflicting Shock.

gems.name: Lightning Penetration
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making those Hits Penetrate enemy Lightning resistance.

gems.name: Lockdown
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing any Pin buildup it inflicts to be stronger the closer the enemy is to you.

gems.name: Longshot I
gems.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to deal more damage from farther away.

gems.name: Longshot II
gems.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to deal more damage from farther away.

gems.name: Maim
gems.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to Maim enemies.

gems.name: Malady
gems.description: Supports Skills which can cause Damaging Hits, causing base chance to inflict Bleed with Supported Skills to instead apply to base chance to Poison, and causing base chance to Poison to instead apply to Bleed.

gems.name: Mana Bounty
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing enemies it kills to grant more Mana Flask charges.

gems.name: Mobility
gems.description: Supports skills that can be used while moving, allowing you to move faster while using them.

gems.name: Momentum
gems.description: Supports any damaging skill that you use yourself, causing it to deal more damage if you move a sufficient distance while using the skill. Teleportation does not count towards the distance travelled.

gems.name: Multishot I
gems.description: Supports Projectile skills, making them fire extra Projectiles. Also lowers Attack and Cast speed of supported skills, as well as lessening their damage.

gems.name: Multishot II
gems.description: Supports Projectile skills, making them fire extra Projectiles. Also lowers Attack and Cast speed of supported skills, as well as lessening their damage.

gems.name: Murderous Intent
gems.description: Supports skills that can Empower skills other than themselves, causing skills they Empower to Cull enemies.

gems.name: Neural Overload
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies. Nearby enemies are marked when they are Primed for Electrocution, and hitting a marked enemy with a supported skill will Electrocute them.

gems.name: Nimble Reload
gems.description: Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills, causing them to Reload bolts significantly faster.

gems.name: Nova Projectiles I
gems.description: Supports Projectile Skills, making them fire Projectiles in a circle. Does not Support Skills which rain down Projectiles from above.

gems.name: Nova Projectiles II
gems.description: Supports Projectile Skills, making them fire extra Projectiles in a circle, at the cost of Damage and gaining a cooldown. Does not Support Skills which rain down Projectiles from above. Cannot Support Skills which already have a cooldown.

gems.name: Outmaneuver
gems.description: Supports Skills you use yourself which can cause Damaging Hits. Supported Skills Break Armour against Parried Enemies.

gems.name: Overabundance I
gems.description: Supports skills which can have a Limited number of effects active at once, increasing that Limit at the cost of their duration. Only applies to restrictions that use the word "Limit".

gems.name: Overabundance II
gems.description: Supports skills which can have a Limited number of effects active at once, increasing that Limit at the cost of their duration. Only applies to restrictions that use the word "Limit".

gems.name: Overcharge
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making its Shocks more effective but reflecting them back to you as well.

gems.name: Overextend
gems.description: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills deal more Damage with Critical Hits, but Critically Hitting an Enemy with them will Daze you for a short time.

gems.name: Overreach
gems.description: Supports Attack Skills which deal Damage in an Area. Supported Skills have significantly increased Area of Effect, but are less Accurate against nearby targets.

gems.name: Payload
gems.description: Supports Skills which fire Grenades, giving fired Grenades a chance to activate again, but lengthening their cooldowns.

gems.name: Perfected Endurance
gems.description: Supports skills which have a benefit for Perfect Timing. Supported Skills grant at least one Endurance Charge when Hitting an enemy with Perfect Timing.

gems.name: Perfection
gems.description: Supports skills which have a benefit for Perfectly Timing their use. On successfully executing Perfect Timing with Supported Skills, gain Perfection, which is a powerful damage buff. However, failing to execute any Perfect Timing (even with skills not supported by Perfection) will remove all Perfection on you.

gems.name: Pierce I
gems.description: Supports Projectile skills, making their Projectiles Pierce an enemy but deal less damage after doing so.

gems.name: Pierce II
gems.description: Supports Projectile skills, making their Projectiles Pierce an enemy.

gems.name: Pierce III
gems.description: Supports Projectile skills, making their Projectiles Pierce an unlimited number of enemies, losing damage as they do so.

gems.name: Pin I
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, allowing its Physical damage to Pin enemies but making it unable to Stun.

gems.name: Pin II
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, allowing its Physical damage to Pin enemies but making it unable to Stun, as well as granting Critial Hit Chance against Immobilised enemies.

gems.name: Pin III
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, allowing its Physical damage to Pin enemies but making it unable to Stun. Pin buildup caused by Supported Skill is lessened, but Pin duration is significantly longer.

gems.name: Poison I
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to Poison enemies.

gems.name: Poison II
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to Poison enemies.

gems.name: Poison III
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to Poison enemies and causing it to inflict more powerful Poisons against Bleeding Enemies.

gems.name: Poison Spores
gems.description: Supports Plant Skills which Hit enemies. Supported Skills Trigger Toxic Pustule on Hitting an enemy.

gems.name: Practiced Combo
gems.description: Supports Strike Skills. Supported Skills have a chance to build additional Combo on Hit. Cannot support Skills used by Minions.

gems.name: Precision I
gems.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to gain increased Accuracy while the Skill is active.

gems.name: Precision II
gems.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to gain increased Accuracy while the Skill is active.

gems.name: Projectile Acceleration I
gems.description: Supports Projectile skills, making those Projectiles travel faster.

gems.name: Projectile Acceleration II
gems.description: Supports Projectile skills, making those Projectiles travel faster, and granting them a chance to Pierce Enemies.

gems.name: Projectile Acceleration III
gems.description: Supports Projectile skills, making those Projectiles travel faster, and causing increases and reductions to Projectile speed to also apply to Damage.

gems.name: Projectile Deceleration I
gems.description: Supports Projectile skills, making those Projectiles travel more slowly.

gems.name: Projectile Deceleration II

gems.description: Supports damaging skills you use yourself, draining the life from one of your Minions on use in order to boost the skill's damage. Only takes effect if you have a Minion with enough life to drain the full amount.

gems.name: Minion Pact II
gems.description: Supports damaging skills you use yourself, draining the life from one of your Minions on use in order to boost the skill's damage. Only takes effect if you have a Minion with enough life to drain the full amount.

gems.name: Morgana's Tempest
gems.description: Supports Spells which create Storms, increasing their Limit and causing them to move from the player towards the target location faster, but become less effective. Cannot Support Triggered Skills.

gems.name: Muster
gems.description: Supports Skills which summon Minions. Supported Minions deal more Damage the more different kinds of Reviving Minions you have summoned.

gems.name: Mysticism I
gems.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to deal increased Spell Damage while on full Energy Shield while the Supported Skill is active.

gems.name: Mysticism II
gems.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to deal increased Spell Damage while on full Energy Shield while the Supported Skill is active.

gems.name: Nadir
gems.description: Supports Skills which gain Stages or Seals. Supported Skills have lower Maximum Stage or Seal count, but have a Minimum Stage or Seal count they cannot fall below.

gems.name: Oisín's Oath
gems.description: Supports Skills which Hit enemies, causing their Mana Leech to recover based on Elemental damage instead of Physical damage.

gems.name: Perpetual Charge
gems.description: Supports skills that consume Power, Frenzy or Endurance Charges on use, giving them a chance not to remove each Charge while still gaining the benefits of consuming them.

gems.name: Physical Mastery
gems.description: Supports Physical skills, granting them an additional level. Does not support skills which do not have levels.

gems.name: Pinpoint Critical
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits Enemies, causing it to Critically Hit more often but deal less damage with Critical Hits.

gems.name: Potent Exposure
gems.description: Supports Skills which apply Exposure to Enemies, increasing the effect of applied Exposure.

gems.name: Potential
gems.description: Supports Skills that you use yourself. Supported Skills will consume a Power Charge on use if possible, and will be much more likely to Critically Hit if they do. Supported Skills cannot generate Power Charges.

gems.name: Practical Magic I
gems.description: Supports Skills which Hit enemies. Heavy Stunning an enemy with Supported Skills increases your Spell damage for a duration.

gems.name: Practical Magic II
gems.description: Supports Skills which Hit enemies. Heavy Stunning an enemy with Supported Skills increases your Spell damage for a duration.

gems.name: Profanity I
gems.description: Supports Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills consume a Corpse on use, dealing more Chaos Damage if they do. Cannot support Triggered Skills or Reservation Skills.

gems.name: Profanity II
gems.description: Supports Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills consume many Corpses on use, dealing more Chaos Damage per Corpse consumed. Cannot support Triggered Skills or Reservation Skills.

gems.name: Rapid Casting I
gems.description: Supports Spells, causing them to cast faster.

gems.name: Rapid Casting II
gems.description: Supports Spells, causing them to cast faster.

gems.name: Rapid Casting III
gems.description: Supports Spells, causing them to cast faster for each different Spell you've cast Recently.

gems.name: Rime
gems.description: Supports Skills which create Ground Surfaces, causing Enemies Chilled by those Surfaces to be more easily Frozen, but at the cost of some Chill magnitude.

gems.name: Rising Tempest
gems.description: Supports Skills which deal Damage, raising Elemental Damage dealt for each Skill used Recently of a different Elemental type. Cannot support Minion Skills.

gems.name: Ritualistic Curse
gems.description: Supports Curse skills, causing them to cover a larger area but take longer to Curse enemies.

gems.name: Sacrificial Lamb I
gems.description: Supports skills which create Minions, causing your skills which can target Minions to prioritise targeting Minions from the Supported Skill.

gems.name: Sacrificial Lamb II
gems.description: Supports skills which create Minions, causing your skills which can target Minions to prioritise targeting Minions from the Supported Skill, as well as causing them to always be considered Detonatable.

gems.name: Sacrificial Offering
gems.description: Supports Offering Skills. Supported Skills Sacrifice a portion of your life on use, but deal much more damage and have more powerful Buffs in return.

gems.name: Shock Conduction I
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to also Shock nearby enemies when you Shock an enemy.

gems.name: Shock Conduction II
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to also Shock nearby enemies when you Shock an enemy. Always Shocks enemies which are Drenched.

gems.name: Shock Siphon
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing you to recover Energy Shield when it kills a Shocked enemy.

gems.name: Sione's Temper
gems.description: Supports Projectile Spells. Supported Spells have an increasingly higher chance to fire many additional Projectiles in a circle, resetting when they do.

gems.name: Spell Cascade
gems.description: Supports Spells that affect an area around you or a target location, causing those Spells to also target additional areas on either side of the target area, along a randomly chosen axis. Cannot support Channelling skills or Remote skills.

gems.name: Spell Echo
gems.description: Supports Spells that affect an area around you or a target location. Supported Spells echo, causing their effects to happen again after a short delay. Cannot support Channelling skills Remote skills or skills which are Triggered.

gems.name: Static Shocks
gems.description: Supports Skills which can Hit enemies. Shocking an enemy with Supported Skills Triggers Static Shocks, causing that enemy to become a source of Lightning damage sending pulses towards nearby enemies.

gems.name: Stormfire
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies. Enemies Shocked by Supported Skills take a percentage of damage from Ignite as Lightning damage as well as Fire damage.

gems.name: Strong Hearted
gems.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing Shock applied to you to last for a shorter duration while the Supported Skill is active.

gems.name: Supercritical
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal more damage with Critical Hits but have less Critical Hit chance.

gems.name: Tecrod's Revenge
gems.description: Supports skills that create Persistent Minions, causing those Minions to fight on when they are fatally wounded, dying after a duration or when they take further damage exceeding their maximum Life. Minions from Supported Skills gain Soul Eater and a burst of speed on entering this state.

gems.name: Thrill of the Kill
gems.description: Supports Skills you use yourself which Hit enemies. Culling a Shocked enemy with Supported Skills infuses all of your Attacks with Lightning damage for a short time.

gems.name: Thrill of the Kill II
gems.description: Supports Skills you use yourself which Hit enemies. Culling a Shocked enemy with Supported Skills infuses all of your Attacks with Lightning damage and grants an increased chance to Shock for a short time.

gems.name: Unbending
gems.description: Supports Spell Skills you use yourself. While using Supported Skills, a percentage of Damage taken is Recouped as Mana, with the percentage scaling higher the longer the Cast time of the Supported Skill. Cannot Support Channelling Skills.

gems.name: Unleash
gems.description: Supports Spells you cast yourself, making their effect reoccur when cast. Cannot support Channelling Skills or Skills with a Cooldown.

gems.name: Upwelling I
gems.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing your Minions to deal increased Damage while you are not on full Mana while the Supported Skill is active.

gems.name: Upwelling II
gems.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing your Minions to deal increased Damage while you are not on full Mana while the Supported Skill is active.

gems.name: Varashta's Blessing
gems.description: Supports any Skill that can deal Damage, causing it to deal more Damage per different Command Skill used.

gems.name: Verglas
gems.description: Supports Skills you use yourself which can Hit Enemies. Supported Skills Gain a percentage of their Damage as Cold Damage when you destroy Ice Crystals.

gems.name: Vilenta's Propulsion
gems.description: Supports Spell Skills that fire Projectiles, causing increases and reductions to cast speed to also apply to Projectile speed.

gems.name: Volatile Power
gems.description: Supports Skills which you use yourself. On using Supported Skills while they are Empowered, you gain Volatility.

gems.name: Volatility
gems.description: Supports Skills you use yourself which can cause Damaging Hits. Supported Skills grant Volatility on Critical Hit.

gems.name: Wildfire
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, Spreading Ignites it inflicts to nearby enemies after a delay.

gems.name: Wildshards I
gems.description: Supports Projectile Spells. Supported Spells have a chance to fire many additional Projectiles in a circle.

gems.name: Wildshards II
gems.description: Supports Projectile Spells. Supported Spells have a chance to fire many additional Projectiles in a circle.

gems.name: Withering Touch
gems.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to Wither enemies on Hit.

gems.name: Xibaqua's Rending
gems.description: Supports Skills that leap into the air, causing Corpses in the area you land to violently explode, damaging surrounding enemies.

gems.name: Zarokh's Refrain
gems.description: Supports Spells that affect an area around you or a target location. Supported Spells echo thrice, causing their effects to happen again after a short delay, but Supported Skills are given a short Cooldown. Cannot support Channelling skills, Remote skills, skills which already have a Cooldown, or skills which are Triggered.

gems.name: Zarokh's Revolt
gems.description: Supports Spells you cast yourself, making their effect reoccur up to five times when cast, but giving them a moderate Cooldown. Cannot support Channelling Skills.

gems.name: Zenith I
gems.description: Supports Spell Skills. Supported Skills deal more damage while you are above 90% of your Maximum Mana. Does not modify Skills used by Minions.

gems.name: Zenith II
gems.description: Supports Spell Skills. Supported Skills have increased Mana cost Efficiency and deal more damage while you are above 90% of your maximum Mana. Does not modify Skills used by Minions.

gems.name: Explosive Demise
gems.description: Detonate an allied Minion whose current Life is below a threshold, dealing heavy Attack damage to nearby enemies.
